title: croton alienus
intro: Croton alienus, also known as the Devil's Backbone, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. Traditionally, the plant's sap and roots have been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Croton alienus include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema, and even lower blood pressure. The herbal preparations of Croton alienus typically involve boiling the roots or sap in water to create a medicinal tea or applying the sap directly to the affected area.
